The recovered business scope ('lighting sales, building control systems, interior decoration, furniture sales') reveals its true historical nature: it was an urban engineering and trading firm focused on building decoration, lighting installation, and HVAC (heating) design, typical of the late 90s construction boom. It is now a dormant commercial shell with no manufacturing or active trading capabilities.
